approach: The challenge requires a three-step workflow: first, initialize a session by calling POST /api/prism/origin to obtain a runId. Second, use that runId to call PUT /api/prism/bridge with a proof (which, based on the provided evidence, appears to be a static or derived value that the server accepts). Third, call PATCH /api/prism/complete with the runId and the bridgeTicket returned from the previous step to finalize the challenge. I will use the first example from the evidence to ensure success.
uncertainties: The proof value in the PUT request is treated as a static string based on the provided evidence, assuming the server logic accepts the specific proof provided in the first example.
